title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hero MotoCorp - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hero MotoCorp - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Hero MotoCorp in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hero MotoCorp:
Hero MotoCorp is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hero MotoCorp!
